summary: Stabilize tqdm progress bars with multi-thread logging by aligning output streams and using a shared lock; keep child bars non-leaving.
source_links: user-report: comprehensive report progress bars broke due to logs/threads
details: Use tqdm.write(..., file=sys.stderr) for logging to the same stream as progress bars.
Set tqdm bars with file=sys.stderr and a global tqdm.set_lock(threading.RLock()) to avoid multi-thread output collisions.
Use leave=False for per-thread child bars so repeated parallel batches don't stack and destabilize the console.
